description:
Following up to my AI Debate with Marcus Hutchins, I share a ton of the work that AI has done for me in just the last few days which seems like undeniable evidence/proof that AI is intelligent.

Blog post here: 
https://danielmiessler.com/blog/this-is-intelligence
